lines: Jim's sitting pretty at the top after Spain absolutely buttfucked Saudi Arabia 4-0 yesterday — Wilmot, mate, your Saudi lads were absolutely dire, and you're watching Jim pull further ahead while your boys got spanked like they owed him money.

Ellis is having a proper fucking nightmare — New Zealand just lost 3-1 to Egypt, Türkiye are already dead in Group D, and her Argentina are about to face a tricky Austria side, so basically her entire portfolio is either struggling or already in the bin.

The Norway clusterfuck continues today — five of you cunts own them (Al, Butters, Callum, Croft, AND Wilmot), so watching that game is basically going to be the most passive-aggressive shared experience since a divorced couple at a school play.

France vs Iraq today is a four-way sweepstake orgy with Callum, Croft, Dene, and The Foreman all riding Les Bleus — which means at least one of those smug bastards is definitely going to be unbearable in the group chat tonight.

Keep your eyes on Jordan vs Algeria — Carter's Algerians are already on zero points and one more slip means they're basically cooked, which would leave Carter clinging to England and Colombia like a man holding onto a lifeboat made of false hope.
